pr.title: Record: Two-Pass Order-12 N-gram Backoff + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 0.1310 (3-seed)

output.summary: 11L Parallel Muon transformer uses a two-pass order-12 n-gram backoff cache rescoring pipeline with BigramHash/Gated Attention and GPTQ-lite int6 quantization.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training run; only evaluation adds the two-pass n-gram cache without val-only training.
